gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.body: Kolbo includes free models so you can start immediately.
gettingStarted.connectHint: Connect from 75+ providers to use other models, including Claude, GPT, Gemini etc

lsp.title: LSP
lsp.disabled: LSPs have been disabled in settings
lsp.waiting: LSPs will activate as files are read

placeholder.fixTodo: Fix a TODO in the codebase
placeholder.techStack: What is the tech stack of this project?

tips.label: Tip
tips.tip_0: Type {highlight}@{/highlight} followed by a filename to fuzzy search and attach files
tips.tip_1: Start a message with {highlight}!{/highlight} to run shell commands directly (e.g., {highlight}!ls -la{/highlight})
tips.tip_2: Press {highlight}Tab{/highlight} to toggle between Build, Plan and Auto-Approve modes
tips.tip_3: Use {highlight}/undo{/highlight} to revert the last message and file changes
tips.tip_4: Use {highlight}/redo{/highlight} to restore previously undone messages and file changes
tips.tip_5: Run {highlight}/share{/highlight} to create a public link to your conversation at kolbo.ai
tips.tip_6: Drag and drop images or PDFs into the terminal to add them as context
tips.tip_7: Press {highlight}Ctrl+V{/highlight} to paste images from your clipboard into the prompt
tips.tip_8: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X E{/highlight} or {highlight}/editor{/highlight} to compose messages in your external editor
tips.tip_9: Run {highlight}/init{/highlight} to auto-generate project rules based on your codebase
tips.tip_10: Run {highlight}/models{/highlight} or {highlight}Ctrl+X M{/highlight} to see and switch between available AI models
tips.tip_11: Use {highlight}/themes{/highlight} or {highlight}Ctrl+X T{/highlight} to switch between built-in themes
tips.tip_12: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X N{/highlight} or {highlight}/new{/highlight} to start a fresh conversation session
tips.tip_13: Use {highlight}/sessions{/highlight} or {highlight}Ctrl+X L{/highlight} to list and continue previous conversations
tips.tip_14: Run {highlight}/compact{/highlight} to summarize long sessions near context limits
tips.tip_15: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X X{/highlight} or {highlight}/export{/highlight} to save the conversation as Markdown
tips.tip_16: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X Y{/highlight} to copy the assistant's last message to clipboard
tips.tip_17: Press {highlight}Ctrl+P{/highlight} to see all available actions and commands
tips.tip_18: Run {highlight}/connect{/highlight} to add API keys for 75+ supported LLM providers
tips.tip_19: The leader key is {highlight}Ctrl+X{/highlight}; combine with other keys for quick actions
tips.tip_20: Press {highlight}F2{/highlight} to quickly switch between recently used models
tips.tip_21: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X B{/highlight} to show/hide the sidebar panel
tips.tip_22: Use {highlight}PageUp{/highlight}/{highlight}PageDown{/highlight} to navigate through conversation history
tips.tip_23: Press {highlight}Ctrl+G{/highlight} or {highlight}Home{/highlight} to jump to the beginning of the conversation
tips.tip_24: Press {highlight}Ctrl+Alt+G{/highlight} or {highlight}End{/highlight} to jump to the most recent message
tips.tip_25: Press {highlight}Shift+Enter{/highlight} or {highlight}Ctrl+J{/highlight} to add newlines in your prompt
tips.tip_26: Press {highlight}Ctrl+C{/highlight} when typing to clear the input field
tips.tip_27: Press {highlight}Escape{/highlight} to stop the AI mid-response
tips.tip_28: Switch to {highlight}Plan{/highlight} agent to get suggestions without making actual changes
tips.tip_29: Use {highlight}@agent-name{/highlight} in prompts to invoke specialized subagents
tips.tip_30: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X Right/Left{/highlight} to cycle through parent and child sessions
tips.tip_31: Create {highlight}kolbo.json{/highlight} for server settings and {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} for TUI settings
tips.tip_32: Place TUI settings in {highlight}~/.config/kolbo/tui.json{/highlight} for global config
tips.tip_33: Add {highlight}$schema{/highlight} to your config for autocomplete in your editor
tips.tip_34: Configure {highlight}model{/highlight} in config to set your default model
tips.tip_35: Override any keybind in {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} via the {highlight}keybinds{/highlight} section
tips.tip_36: Set any keybind to {highlight}none{/highlight} to disable it completely
tips.tip_37: Configure local or remote MCP servers in the {highlight}mcp{/highlight} config section
tips.tip_38: Kolbo auto-handles OAuth for remote MCP servers requiring auth
tips.tip_39: Add {highlight}.md{/highlight} files to {highlight}.kolbo/command/{/highlight} to define reusable custom prompts
tips.tip_40: Use {highlight}$ARGUMENTS{/highlight}, {highlight}$1{/highlight}, {highlight}$2{/highlight} in custom commands for dynamic input
tips.tip_41: Use backticks in commands to inject shell output (e.g., {highlight}`git status`{/highlight})
tips.tip_42: Add {highlight}.md{/highlight} files to {highlight}.kolbo/agent/{/highlight} for specialized AI personas
tips.tip_43: Configure per-agent permissions for {highlight}edit{/highlight}, {highlight}bash{/highlight}, and {highlight}webfetch{/highlight} tools
tips.tip_44: Use patterns like {highlight}"git *": "allow"{/highlight} for granular bash permissions
tips.tip_46: Configure {highlight}"git push": "ask"{/highlight} to require approval before pushing
tips.tip_47: Kolbo auto-formats files using prettier, gofmt, ruff, and more
tips.tip_48: Set {highlight}"formatter": false{/highlight} in config to disable all auto-formatting
tips.tip_49: Define custom formatter commands with file extensions in config
tips.tip_50: Kolbo uses LSP servers for intelligent code analysis
tips.tip_51: Create {highlight}.ts{/highlight} files in {highlight}.kolbo/tools/{/highlight} to define new LLM tools
tips.tip_52: Tool definitions can invoke scripts written in Python, Go, etc
tips.tip_53: Add {highlight}.ts{/highlight} files to {highlight}.kolbo/plugin/{/highlight} for event hooks
tips.tip_54: Use plugins to send OS notifications when sessions complete
tips.tip_55: Create a plugin to prevent Kolbo from reading sensitive files
tips.tip_57: Use {highlight}kolbo --continue{/highlight} to resume the last session
tips.tip_58: Use {highlight}kolbo run -f file.ts{/highlight} to attach files via CLI
tips.tip_59: Use {highlight}--format json{/highlight} for machine-readable output in scripts
tips.tip_60: Run {highlight}kolbo serve{/highlight} for headless API access to Kolbo
tips.tip_61: Use {highlight}kolbo run --attach{/highlight} to connect to a running server
tips.tip_62: Run {highlight}kolbo upgrade{/highlight} to update to the latest version
tips.tip_63: Run {highlight}kolbo auth list{/highlight} to see all configured providers
tips.tip_64: Run {highlight}kolbo agent create{/highlight} for guided agent creation
tips.tip_65: Use {highlight}/kolbo{/highlight} in GitHub issues/PRs to trigger AI actions
tips.tip_66: Run {highlight}kolbo github install{/highlight} to set up the GitHub workflow
tips.tip_67: Comment {highlight}/kolbo fix this{/highlight} on issues to auto-create PRs
tips.tip_68: Comment {highlight}/oc{/highlight} on PR code lines for targeted code reviews
tips.tip_69: Use {highlight}"theme": "system"{/highlight} to match your terminal's colors
tips.tip_70: Create JSON theme files in {highlight}.kolbo/themes/{/highlight} directory
tips.tip_71: Themes support dark/light variants for both modes
tips.tip_72: Reference ANSI colors 0-255 in custom themes
tips.tip_73: Use {highlight}{env:VAR_NAME}{/highlight} syntax to reference environment variables in config
tips.tip_74: Use {highlight}{file:path}{/highlight} to include file contents in config values
tips.tip_75: Use {highlight}instructions{/highlight} in config to load additional rules files
tips.tip_77: Configure {highlight}steps{/highlight} to limit agentic iterations per request
tips.tip_78: Set {highlight}"tools": {"bash": false}{/highlight} to disable specific tools
tips.tip_79: Set {highlight}"mcp_*": false{/highlight} to disable all tools from an MCP server
tips.tip_80: Override global tool settings per agent configuration
tips.tip_81: Set {highlight}"share": "auto"{/highlight} to automatically share all sessions
tips.tip_82: Set {highlight}"share": "disabled"{/highlight} to prevent any session sharing
tips.tip_83: Run {highlight}/unshare{/highlight} to remove a session from public access
tips.tip_84: Permission {highlight}doom_loop{/highlight} prevents infinite tool call loops
tips.tip_86: Run {highlight}kolbo debug config{/highlight} to troubleshoot configuration
tips.tip_87: Use {highlight}--print-logs{/highlight} flag to see detailed logs in stderr
tips.tip_88: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X G{/highlight} or {highlight}/timeline{/highlight} to jump to specific messages
tips.tip_89: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X H{/highlight} to toggle code block visibility in messages
tips.tip_90: Press {highlight}Ctrl+X S{/highlight} or {highlight}/status{/highlight} to see system status info
tips.tip_91: Enable {highlight}scroll_acceleration{/highlight} in {highlight}tui.json{/highlight} for smooth macOS-style scrolling
tips.tip_92: Toggle username display in chat via command palette ({highlight}Ctrl+P{/highlight})
tips.tip_93: Run {highlight}docker run -it --rm ghcr.io/Zoharvan12/kolbo-cli{/highlight} for containerized use
tips.tip_94: Use {highlight}/connect{/highlight} to add your Kolbo.AI account or another provider
tips.tip_95: Commit your project's {highlight}KOLBO.md{/highlight} file to Git for team sharing
tips.tip_96: Use {highlight}/review{/highlight} to review uncommitted changes, branches, or PRs
tips.tip_97: Run {highlight}/help{/highlight} or {highlight}Ctrl+X H{/highlight} to show the help dialog
tips.tip_98: Use {highlight}/rename{/highlight} to rename the current session
tips.tip_99_win: Press {highlight}Ctrl+Z{/highlight} to undo changes in your prompt
tips.tip_99_unix: Press {highlight}Ctrl+Z{/highlight} to suspend the terminal and return to your shell

session.noProviderForSummarize: Connect a provider to summarize this session
session.failedToCopyUrl: Failed to copy URL to clipboard
session.shareConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to share it?

build.name: Build
build.description: The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.

plan.name: Plan
plan.description: Plan mode. Disallows all edit tools.

autoApprove.name: Auto-Approve
autoApprove.description: Auto-approve mode. Skips all permission prompts — use with care.

permission.tellKolboDifferently: Tell Kolbo what to do differently
permission.allowUntilRestart: This will allow {{permission}} until Kolbo is restarted.
permission.allowPatternsUntilRestart: This will allow the following patterns until Kolbo is restarted
permission.doomLoopBody: This keeps the session running despite repeated failures.

update.prompt: A new release v{{version}} is available. Would you like to update now?
update.completeMessage: Successfully updated to Kolbo v{{version}}. Please restart the application.

toast.noTextParts: No text parts found in last assistant message
toast.noTextContent: No text content found in last assistant message
toast.failedToCopyConsoleSelection: Failed to copy console selection to clipboard: {{error}}
